purpose: Traceable evidence registry for influenza target selection. This file stores source endpoints and literature queries, not copyrighted full text.

official_sources.title: CDC Influenza Antiviral Medications: Summary for Clinicians
official_sources.evidence_role: Confirms currently used influenza antivirals and drug classes.

official_sources.title: CDC Antiviral Drug Resistance among Influenza Viruses
official_sources.evidence_role: Supports M2 adamantane resistance caveat and resistance-aware interpretation.

official_sources.title: WHO Antiviral susceptibility of influenza viruses: neuraminidase inhibitor methods
official_sources.evidence_role: Supports neuraminidase inhibition assay as a validation route.

official_sources.title: FDA Influenza Antiviral Drugs and Related Information
official_sources.evidence_role: Regulatory source for influenza antiviral products and labels.

open_data_sources.title: RCSB Protein Data Bank
open_data_sources.evidence_role: Protein-ligand structure metadata and structure provenance.

open_data_sources.title: PubMed / NCBI E-utilities
open_data_sources.evidence_role: Literature metadata for target, drug, structure, and assay evidence.

open_data_sources.title: ChEMBL
open_data_sources.evidence_role: Known bioactivity and target-ligand data entry point.

open_data_sources.title: BindingDB
open_data_sources.evidence_role: Curated binding and inhibition data entry point.

open_data_sources.title: PubChem
open_data_sources.evidence_role: Compound identifiers, structures, and bioassay entry point.

open_data_sources.title: UniProt
open_data_sources.evidence_role: Protein sequence, annotation, and accession lookup entry point.

pubmed: "influenza A H1N1" neuraminidase oseltamivir crystal structure
"2009 pandemic H1N1" neuraminidase oseltamivir zanamivir laninamivir
"influenza neuraminidase" inhibitor assay oseltamivir zanamivir peramivir
open_data_queries: ChEMBL target search: influenza A neuraminidase
PubChem compound controls: oseltamivir, zanamivir, peramivir, laninamivir
ChEMBL target search: influenza B neuraminidase
BindingDB query: influenza B neuraminidase inhibitor
PubChem compound controls: oseltamivir, zanamivir, peramivir

pubmed: "influenza A" PA endonuclease baloxavir crystal structure
"influenza" cap-dependent endonuclease inhibitor baloxavir resistance I38
open_data_queries: ChEMBL target search: influenza PA endonuclease
BindingDB query: influenza PA endonuclease baloxavir
ChEMBL target search: influenza B PA endonuclease

pubmed: "influenza A M2 proton channel" amantadine structure
open_data_queries: ChEMBL target search: influenza A M2 proton channel
